title: Minecraft Bedrock Aim Assist Categories 1.21.50
description: A camera aim-assist categories definition for a behavior pack.

camera_aim_assist_categories_definition.title: Camera Aim Assist Categories Definition
camera_aim_assist_categories_definition.description: A single Camera Aim-Assist Categories Definition.

categories.description: List of categories used by Camera Aim-Assist 'minecraft:aim_assist_preset'.

camera_aim_assist_category_definition.title: Camera Aim Assist Category Definition
camera_aim_assist_category_definition.description: A single aim-assist category used during lookup.

name.description: Name of the Aim-Assist Category used during lookup.

camera_aim_assist_category_priorities.title: Camera Aim Assist Category Priorities
camera_aim_assist_category_priorities.description: The set of priorities used when determining aim-assist selection.

block_default.description: Optional. Default Aim-Assist targeting priority used for Blocks not found in 'blocks'.

entity_default.description: Optional. Default Aim-Assist targeting priority used for Entities not found in 'entities'.

blocks.description: Optional. Map of Block identifiers to Aim-Assist targeting priority. Larger numbers have greater priority.

entities.description: Optional. Map of Entity identifiers to Aim-Assist targeting priority. Larger numbers have greater priority.

block_tags.description: Optional. Map of Block tags to Aim-Assist targeting priority. Larger numbers have greater priority.

entity_type_families.description: Optional. Map of Entity type families to Aim-Assist targeting priority. Larger numbers have greater priority.
